title: Logical error: 'Storage type 'DeltaLakeLocal' is not supported by distributed DDL'
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
With this config:
```xml
<remote_servers>
<cluster0>
<shard>
<replica>
<host>localhost</host>
<port>9000</port>
</replica>
</shard>
</cluster0>
</remote_servers>
```
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ON CLUSTER 'cluster0' (c0 Int) ENGINE = DeltaLakeLocal(local, format = 'Parquet', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/spark_catalog/test/t0');
ALTER TABLE t0 ON CLUSTER 'cluster0' MATERIALIZE COLUMN c0;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Storage type 'DeltaLakeLocal' is not supported by distributed DDL'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000275fa632
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000014708fe9
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d22118e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d220b91
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String>::type>, String&&) @ 0x000000000d220776
5. src/Interpreters/DDLWorker.cpp:777: DB::DDLWorker::tryExecuteQueryOnLeaderReplica(DB::DDLTaskBase&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IStorage>, String const&, std::shared_ptr<zkutil::ZooKeeper> const&, std::unique_ptr<zkutil::ZooKeeperLock, std::default_delete<zkutil::ZooKeeperLock>>&) @ 0x000000001b680e5e
6. src/Interpreters/DDLWorker.cpp:679: DB::DDLWorker::processTask(DB::DDLTaskBase&, std::shared_ptr<zkutil::ZooKeeper> const&, bool) @ 0x000000001b6785c4
7. src/Interpreters/DDLWorker.cpp:459: DB::DDLWorker::scheduleTasks(bool) @ 0x000000001b6755b2
8. src/Interpreters/DDLWorker.cpp:1226: DB::DDLWorker::runMainThread() @ 0x000000001b66e43f
9. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<true, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (DB::DDLWorker::*)(), DB::DDLWorker*>(void (DB::DDLWorker::*&&)(), DB::DDLWorker*&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x000000001b68ca26
10. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x000000001484d026
11. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: void* std::__thread_proxy[abi:se190107]<std::tuple<std::unique_ptr<std::__thread_struct, std::default_delete<std::__thread_struct>>, void (ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>>(void*) @ 0x0000000014853a40
12. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f1
13. __clone3 @ 0x0000000000133c9c
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP) ENGINE = OBTable;
CREATE TABLE t2 (user_id INT, score FLOAT, status VARCHAR(255)) ENGINE = OBTable;
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'Alice', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (2, 'Bob', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT t1.name, t2.score FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id WHERE t2.status IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: DeltaLakeLocal storage type not supported by distributed DDL
